hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in */.claude/settings.json) printf 'BLOCKED: hook config is part of the harness — do not modify it during a build session.\n' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; case "$f" in */supabase/migrations/*) if [ -f "$f" ]; then printf 'BLOCKED: applied migrations are append-only — create a NEW migration file instead (AGENTS.md > Non-negotiables).\n' >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -n "$cmd" ] || exit 0; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(rm|unlink|git +checkout|git +restore).*(supabase/migrations|packages/ui/src/tokens\.css|feature_list\.json)'; then printf 'BLOCKED: destructive command targets a protected path (migrations, design tokens, or feature_list.json) — see AGENTS.md > Non-negotiables.\n' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -n "$cmd" ] || exit 0; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git([^|;&]*) config .*user\.(name|email)'; then printf 'BLOCKED: commit identity comes from the existing git config / gh auth login — never reconfigure user.name or user.email in a build session (AGENTS.md > Non-negotiables).\n' >&2; exit 2; fi; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git([^|;&]*) commit|gh +pr'; then if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'co-authored-by|generated with|noreply@anthropic|--author[= ]|-c +user\.'; then printf 'BLOCKED: no AI attribution and no author overrides — commits and PRs carry the human owner identity from git config / gh auth, with no Co-Authored-By trailers or Generated-with footers (AGENTS.md > Non-negotiables).\n' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in */feature_list.json) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; err=$(jq empty "$f" 2>&1) || { printf 'Invalid JSON in %s:
%s
' "$f" "$err" >&2; exit 2; }; bad=$(jq -r '[.features[]?.status] - ["not_started","in_progress","blocked","passing"] | .[]' "$f" 2>&1); if [ -n "$bad" ]; then printf 'Invalid feature status value(s) in %s: %s (must be one of not_started/in_progress/blocked/passing)
' "$f" "$bad" >&2; exit 2; fi; wip=$(jq -r '[.features[]? | select(.status == "in_progress")] | length' "$f"); if [ "$wip" -gt 1 ]; then printf '%s has %s features in_progress — only ONE is allowed at a time (single-WIP, AGENTS.md > Task tracking).
' "$f" "$wip" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

cat <<'MSG'
Session start — read, in order: AGENTS.md (rulebook + Definition of Done), claude-progress.md's "Current Verified State" section, then session-handoff.md. Do not start work before all three are read.
MSG

fl="feature_list.json"; [ -f "$fl" ] || exit 0; wip=$(jq -r '[.features[]? | select(.status == "in_progress")] | length' "$fl" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$wip" -gt 0 ]; then printf 'BLOCKED: %s feature(s) still in_progress in feature_list.json — finish or mark blocked before ending the session. Run clean-state-checklist.md first.\n' "$wip" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
hooks.statusMessage: Checking clean-state Stop gate (no in_progress features)
